queries.query: Review our llms.txt and AGENTS.md so coding agents can navigate the repo.
Is our documentation retrieval-friendly for RAG and agents? Check chunk survivability and stable anchors.
Design the streaming, tool-use, structured-output, and agent-loop API for our new LLM SDK.
Is this AGENTS.md agent-ready, and do our CLAUDE.md / Cursor / Copilot mirrors stay in sync?
Our tooltip-only guidance is invisible to agents — resolve the human-vs-agent documentation conflict.
Scaffold AGENTS.md, hooks, and a sandbox to harden this repo for Claude Code and Cursor.
We have eval traces of recurring agent failures — promote the patterns into rules and gates.
Audit our AI feature's feedback loops and set up an eval/optimization flywheel.
Refactor this React component to reduce re-renders.
Run a usability audit on our checkout flow for end users.
Review the p99 latency and tracing of our payments service.
Make our REST API reference clearer for human developers reading the docs site.
Should our product expose an MCP server, and how do we document it so agents can use it?
